examples: The lively survivor surveyed the conveyer.
I can't move it. Could you help me get it out of the conveyer belt?
Japanese dealers hawk their wares on eBay, ensuring that deadstock of Lou Ragland Conveyer LPs fetch a worthy 100, 000 yen.
The 65-pound, 48-by-40-inch platforms are slapped onto a conveyer belt and run through an MRI-like chamber, where lasers scan them for defects.
